childhood.familyBackground: Family with history in Spanish industrial base. Business in metals and construction materials.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 스페인 산업 기초의 역사를 가진 가족
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in post-civil war Spain during economic recovery. Family business foundation.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 경제 회복 중 내전 후 스페인에서 성장

careerTimeline.event: Entered family metals and mining operations
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 금속 및 광업 운영 진입

careerTimeline.event: Expanded mining across Spain and Portugal

failures.lesson: Cyclical industries need long-term capital management
failures.lessonKo: 순환 산업은 장기 자본 관리 필요

recommended.title: The Lean Startup
recommended.author: Eric Ries
recommended.note: Influences business strategy and innovation approach
recommended.noteKo: 비즈니스 전략 및 혁신 접근에 영향

personalTraits.knownFor: Leading Spanish metals mining with sustainable focus
personalTraits.knownForKo: 지속 가능한 초점의 스페인 금속 광업 주도
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports environmental conservation and community development
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 환경 보호 및 지역 사회 개발을 지원
